query:
SELECT id, name, location, priority,
  LEFT(overview, 400) AS overview_snippet,
  equipmentSignals
FROM projects
WHERE (
  location LIKE '%NSW%' OR location LIKE '%New South Wales%'
  OR location LIKE '%VIC%' OR location LIKE '%Victoria%'
  OR location LIKE '%SA%' OR location LIKE '%South Australia%'
  OR location LIKE '%TAS%' OR location LIKE '%Tasmania%'
  OR location LIKE '%Sydney%' OR location LIKE '%Melbourne%'
  OR location LIKE '%Adelaide%' OR location LIKE '%Hobart%'
  OR location LIKE '%Newcastle%' OR location LIKE '%Wollongong%'
  OR location LIKE '%Geelong%' OR location LIKE '%Launceston%'
)
AND (
  overview LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR overview LIKE '%sandblast%'
  OR overview LIKE '%grit blast%' OR overview LIKE '%blast and paint%'
  OR overview LIKE '%blasting and painting%' OR overview LIKE '%blast clean%'
  OR overview LIKE '%blast coat%' OR overview LIKE '%blast pot%'
  OR name LIKE '%blast and paint%' OR name LIKE '%blast clean%'
  OR name LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR name LIKE '%sandblast%'
);
